output.srepr: Mul(Symbol('A0', positive=True, real=True), exp(Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('Gamma', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('mu', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)), Symbol('tau', positive=True, real=True))))

method: A_rad relaxation solution A0 * exp(-Gamma*mu^2*tau) for dA_rad/dtau = -Gamma mu^2 A_rad
